site.title: Events & Giveaways | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom event giveaways, swag, trade show items & promo products for conferences, tournaments, corporate events, weddings & community programs.

hero.title: Events & Giveaways
hero.imageAlt: Custom event giveaways and branded promotional products

centreText.title: Great Events Need Great Gear
centreText.description: From conferences & tournaments to staff events & community programs, we help you choose branded products that are popular, practical, on budget & ready to impress.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom branded event giveaways and swag

features.title: Trending Trade Shows
features.description:
The right promo products attract attention, look professional & keep people engaged at conferences, trade shows & conventions. As a full-service print shop, we offer complete trade show packages including tablecloths, banners, media walls, flags, signs, brochures & swag.

  • Tote bags & drawstring backpacks
  • Pens & notebooks
  • Water bottles & travel mugs
  • Lanyards & badge holders
  • Chargers & tech accessories

Pair your promo items with banners, pop-up displays & signage to create a complete trade show setup that looks polished from every angle.

features.title: Big Bold Event Gear
features.description:
For sports tournaments, school or corporate events, fundraisers, camps, weddings or church celebrations, customizable products help create a memorable experience.

  • Balls, towels & umbrellas
  • Water bottles, hats, t-shirts & hoodies
  • Cooler bags & fun outdoor items
  • Party & welcome bags
  • Handy home & office essentials

Show your community you care with carefully curated items that are sure to be enjoyed.

features.title: Fresh Ideas. Strong Branding
features.description:
We help our clients choose products that are current, useful & perfectly suited to your audience & event. Don't waste your time or money on outdated giveaway items that get ignored.

  • Drinkware & insulated mugs
  • Phone accessories & chargers
  • Wellness & lifestyle items
  • Eco-friendly & reusable products
  • Upscale & exclusive gift items
  • Made in Canada swag

We'll help you stay on budget, on trend & aligned with your event goals.
